news.headline: LSPedia opens new office in Hyderabad, India in Jan 2025 to serve global markets, enhance customer service. #Expansion #Hyderabad #LSPedia
news.summary: In December 2024, LSPedia revealed plans to inaugurate a new branch in Hyderabad, India, by January 2025. This move aligns with the company's objective to cater to global markets, enhance customer service operations, and solidify its presence.

news.headline: Nominations open for the 2024-25 VIN Veritas Award honoring those serving science in the veterinary community.
news.summary: Nominations for the Annual VIN Veritas Award organized by the Veterinary Information Network (VIN) are now open. The award, derived from the Latin word for truth, is dedicated to recognizing individuals contributing to the field of science. Established by VIN, a global veterinary community based in Davis, California, the award acknowledges those who exemplify dedication and excellence in their work. This prestigious honor signifies a commitment to upholding the values of truth and integrity within the veterinary profession. The nominations for the award will be accepted until the deadline on (insert specific deadline).

news.headline: Sidecar Health partners with Ohio State's Wexner Medical Center in fixed-price care deal, impacting cancer treatment.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, on December 19, 2024, a leading consumer-driven health insurance provider, Sidecar Health, revealed a transparent pricing deal with The Ohio State University Wexner Medical Center. This medical center houses the third-largest cancer hospital in the United States.

news.headline: VCI Global to acquire 1.14 MW solar farm in North Macedonia for $1.26 million, part of renewable energy asset strategy.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on December 19, 2024, VCI Global Limited (NASDAQ: VCIG) announced its plan to acquire a solar farm in Novo Selo, North Macedonia. The solar farm has an estimated capacity of 1.14 megawatts (MW). The acquisition is set at around US$1.26 million (approximately €1.2 million). Prior to finalization, the acquisition is contingent on due diligence procedures and the formalization of a definitive agreement.

news.headline: Dream Exchange hosts fireside chat in Chicago with local minority business community at Union League Club on Nov 19, 2024, with notable panelist Dwain Kyles.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 19, 2024, Dream Exchange organized a fireside chat at the Union League Club, engaging with the local minority business community. This event was held on Tuesday, November 19, 2024. Attended by notable panelists like Dwain Kyles, Managing Member of DX, the conversation aimed to empower minority businesses.

news.headline: "NĀ KOA's Kaulele Collection expands with premium leather accessories featuring Polynesian tattoo art."
news.summary: In Mililani, Hawaii on December 19, 2024, Patch of Shade, Inc. introduced an expansion to its popular Kaulele Collection under the NĀ KOA® brand of leather products. This line includes handbags and wallets adorned with a Polynesian tattoo design by a well-known artist. Customers can find these new items on the company's website, www.nakoa.com.

The app aims to help users expand their social circle and organize enjoyable activities. Its launch marks a significant step in enhancing social connections in the region.

news.headline: Havana 1957 & Cortadito Coffee House debut in Flamingo Las Vegas on Dec. 28, celebrating Cuban culture. (Total characters: 100)
news.summary: The much-loved South Florida restaurant, bar, and coffee house is set to open its first locations in Vegas on December 28. By bringing the vibrant culture and flavors of Cuba to Las Vegas, the establishment aims to cater to both visitors and locals alike. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on December 19, 2024, with high-resolution images and renderings available for viewing. Residents and tourists can look forward to experiencing the Cuban American fusion at these new spots in the entertainment capital.

news.headline: TouchMath wins 2024 Excellence in Equity Award for advancing educational equity. Hosted by American Consortium for Equity in Education.
news.summary: Presented by The American Consortium for Equity in Education, the event honors companies, products, and individuals committed to promoting educational equity and access. The ceremony took place in Colorado Springs, Colo. on December 19, 2024; hosted by TouchMath, a purposeful organization dedicated to serving the community.

news.headline: Neogen to release second-quarter earnings on Jan 9, 2025. Conference call and webcast to follow.
news.summary: Neogen® Corporation, a company listed on the NASDAQ as NEOG, is set to release its second-quarter earnings report on Thursday, January 9, 2025. The announcement will be made before the market opens. Following this release, executives of the company will conduct a webcast and conference call on the same day to discuss the earnings report and other related information. The webcast and call are scheduled to start in the morning.

news.headline: Boston Mutual Life Insurance Company appoints Jonathon Eric Pointer as Regional Sales Director for Southeastern region.
news.summary: Today, Jonathon Eric Pointer has been appointed to lead sales operations in the Southeastern region for Boston Mutual Life Insurance Company, based in CANTON, Mass. This national life insurance carrier offers insurance solutions for individuals and workplaces. The announcement was made on December 19, 2024, via PRNewswire. This move is part of the company's strategy to enhance its presence in the region and boost sales numbers.

The standout points from the report include surpassing estimated earnings by 7.000000000000001%, revealing an EPS of $1.09 in contrast to the projected $1.02. Additionally, revenue witnessed a notable increase of $185.00 million compared to the previous year’s corresponding period. For further details, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Missouri's Proper Brands to merge with Vireo Growth Inc. in $397M deal, adding Nevada, Utah cannabis brands.
news.summary: St. Louis - In a recent development, Proper Brands, a company based in Missouri, has agreed to merge with Vireo Growth Inc. in a deal worth $397 million.

Daily Muse, Inc. acquires Purpose Jobs for enhanced public sector and Midwest reach. Strengthening employer branding solutions.

This move is set to bolster The Muse's capabilities, providing a comprehensive suite of solutions for businesses looking to enhance their recruitment strategies.

news.headline: Security Properties and Rockwood Capital partnership acquire 284-unit NV Apartments in Portland, Oregon. Built in 2016.
news.summary: Seattle, December 19, 2024 - Security Properties and a Rockwood Capital affiliate have successfully completed the purchase of NV Apartments in Portland, Oregon. This multifamily property, constructed in 2016, consists of 284 units. The acquisition was finalized recently, showcasing a strategic move in the real estate sector.

news.headline: Clever Pro partners with four top 20 mortgage servicers to boost retention, boasting 3,000 five-star reviews.

news.headline: Candice McNaught appointed as SVP, Business Development at Planet Home Lending, Dec. 19, 2024.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, in Meriden, Connecticut, a prominent national mortgage lender, servicer, and asset manager named Planet Home Lending appointed Candice McNaught as the Senior Vice President for Business Development and Strategic Initiatives within the Distributed Retail channel. The contact center as a service (CCaaS) market is experiencing growth and advancements in providing value to businesses. The trend of utilizing generative artificial intelligence (GenAI) is prominent in the CCaaS market, aligning with trends in other customer experience (CX) IT sectors. AI technologies, particularly GenAI, are increasingly integrated into the market offering additional benefits for organizations. The report covers insights into this evolving market scenario.

news.headline: VetsinTech releases plan to boost military spouses in tech careers, aiming to support them through education and employment.

This document outlines their strategic approach to supporting veterans and enhancing their opportunities in various tech sectors.

news.headline: MDVIP expands in Texas with 3 new primary care practices in Dallas, Houston, New Braunfels. Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: Dr. Corinthia McLeroy, an internist from Dallas, along with Dr. Alfredo Ermac Jr., a family physician from Houston, and Dr. Kyle Fehlis, a family doctor from New Braunfels, have recently opened MDVIP-affiliated practices in Texas. This initiative took place on Dec. 19, 2024, as per a press release from MDVIP. MDVIP is known as a leading provider of membership-based healthcare services.

news.headline: Cargotec's Board okays new share-based incentives for key employees.
American Water Charitable Foundation awards 3 nonprofit educational institutions $25,000 each for workforce readiness.
news.summary: A 501(c)(3) organization, the American Water Charitable Foundation, supported by American Water (NYSE: AWK), the leading water and wastewater utility in the U.S, along with Pennsylvania American Water, disclosed the provision of $25,000 Workforce Readiness Grants to three nonprofit educational institutions. Recognized for their contribution, Regina Hiler expressed gratitude for the Foundation's assistance in workforce development.

news.headline: Nike stock Q2 earnings expected at $0.63/share, revenue $12.11 billion. Stock offers 2.08% annual dividend yield.
news.summary: Sportswear giant, Nike, Inc (NYSE:NKE) is set to announce its second-quarter earnings on Thursday, Dec. 19. Analysts are predicting earnings of 63 cents per share for this quarter, a decline from $1.03 per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to generate quarterly revenue of $12.11 billion, a decrease from $13.39 billion in the previous year. Nike’s current annual dividend yield stands at 2.08%, with a quarterly dividend payout of 40 cents per share ($1.60 annually). Investors are keeping a close watch on Nike’s performance amid anticipation of potential gains. For further details, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Homebuyers with kids more likely to receive family help for down payments; 25% with kids, 12% without, according to Redfin survey.
news.summary: In Seattle, according to a survey by Redfin, 25% of recent homebuyers with children received cash gifts from family to assist with the down payment. This is over double the 12% of buyers without children who received similar gifts. Additionally, 17% of homeowners with kids received family assistance for mortgage payments. The data, from the technology-driven real estate brokerage Redfin, highlights the significant role family support plays in homeownership, particularly for those with children.

news.headline: Chungnam National University researchers create edible biofilm to extend fruit shelf life, reducing food waste. (Char: 103)
news.summary: In Daejeon, South Korea, as of December 19, 2024, there have been notable advancements in transportation technology leading to enhanced access to fresh food. Yet, this positive development has triggered rising worries regarding food wastage throughout the transportation and storage processes.

news.headline: Empress Hotel La Jolla in California offers ideal accommodations for business & leisure travelers, located minutes from La Jolla's attractions.
news.summary: Situated in the heart of La Jolla Village, California, the Empress Hotel La Jolla is an ideal choice for both business and leisure guests exploring the area. Boasting a strategic location near the stunning attractions of La Jolla, this hotel offers a perfect setting for visitors to the San Diego region. The hotel's prime location provides quick access to the beauty of La Jolla and beyond, making it a top choice for travelers seeking a convenient and comfortable stay.

news.headline: New Floor & Decor store opens in Littleton, CO; exciting news for residents with 100+ jobs created.
news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, with a total of 8.1 million people currently out of work. This decrease is attributed to the gradual reopening of businesses and the continued distribution of vaccines. Additionally, the economy saw a growth of 6.2% in the last quarter, with the GDP reaching $22.5 trillion. Consumer spending has also increased by 8.9% as more people are returning to pre-pandemic activities. The government has announced plans to invest $2.3 billion in various sectors to further stimulate economic growth and job creation in the coming months.

news.headline: Glimmery Moments introduces Seasonal Self-Discovery Guide in Rotterdam to help build resilience and set goals.
news.summary: Glimmery Moments, based in Rotterdam, Netherlands, has developed the Seasonal Self-Discovery Guide, which combines behavioral science and mindfulness techniques. This guide serves as a practical tool for enhancing resilience, goal-setting, and fostering a fulfilling life amidst evolving societal demands. Launched on December 19, 2024, this innovative framework aims to assist individuals in navigating uncertainties and crafting purpose-driven lifestyles.

news.headline: Luminys teams up with Foxlink for AI innovation in security solutions, utilizing Ubilink AI Center. US growth focus.
news.summary: Utilizing Foxlink's Ubilink AI Supercomputing Center in Irvine, California, Luminys Systems Corp (Luminys), a prominent supplier of smart, sustainable, and interconnected technology, aims to expedite its expansion in the United States and foster advancements in innovative solutions. The collaboration, announced on December 19, 2024, signifies a strategic move by Luminys to leverage Foxlink's advanced AI capabilities for growth. This development underscores Luminys' commitment to driving progress in smart and sustainable technologies, positioning them at the forefront of transformative innovation.

news.headline: US weekly jobless claims drop as third-quarter GDP increases.

Global AI in Energy Market to reach $58.66 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 36.9%. Top players include Schneider Electric, GE Vernova, ABB Ltd. Opportunities lie in renewable energy integration and carbon emission reduction.
news.summary: The global AI in Energy Market is expected to grow from $8.91 billion in 2024 to $58.66 billion by 2030, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 36.9%. The market report by MarketsandMarkets™ contains 394 tables, 62 figures, and is spread across 319 pages. Drivers for this growth include energy market volatility, consumer demand for smart energy solutions, while the industry faces restraints like data privacy concerns and high implementation costs. Key players in the market include Schneider Electric SE, GE Vernova, ABB Ltd, and others. The application of AI and Machine Learning in energy can lead to reduced labor hours and operational costs by moving towards predictive maintenance strategies. Solutions segment is predicted to have the largest market size in the forecast period. Shifts toward carbon emission reduction and renewable energy integration provide opportunities for growth in the field.

news.headline: BAM Management wins Indiana Management Company of the Year award for 2024 by IAA for exemplary performance.
news.summary: In Indianapolis on December 19, 2024, BAM Management was honored as the 2024 Management Company of the Year by the Indiana Apartment Association (IAA). This prestigious award highlighted BAM Management's outstanding portfolio, employee initiatives, workplace environment, community contributions, and industry participation.

news.headline: Unibet sponsors 2025 IIHF Ice Hockey World Championship in Sweden and Denmark, strengthening its presence.
news.summary: In Sliema, Malta, on December 19, 2024, Kindred Group plc revealed that its primary brand, Unibet, has been named an Official Sponsor for the 2025 IIHF Ice Hockey World Championship. The championship will be held across various countries including Sweden and Denmark. This partnership marks a significant step for Unibet in expanding its reach and presence in the sporting world.

news.headline: Arizona's Hard Money Lenders offers competitive rates and fast funding for bridge loans, led by Michael Iuculano.
news.summary: In Phoenix on December 19, 2024, Hard Money Lenders Arizona revealed their new competitive rates and efficient funding process for bridge loans. The company, under the guidance of Michael Iuculano, a prominent alternative lending specialist in Arizona, is offering attractive loan options for borrowers in need of fast funding solutions.

news.headline: Sunny's new report discusses America's loneliness epidemic based on U.S. Census data, offers solutions.
news.summary: A recent report by Sunny, a nonprofit organization focused on promoting meaningful social connections, has unveiled insightful findings from the U.S. Census Household Pulse Survey. This report, titled "Social Connection in the Modern World," offers groundbreaking insights into the state of social connections in today's society. Released on December 19, 2024, in Dallas, the report sheds light on key statistics and trends concerning social interactions. Through analysis of data from the survey, Sunny aims to highlight the importance of fostering genuine social connections in the modern age. This report serves as a valuable resource for understanding and improving social connections, with implications for individuals, communities, and society as a whole.

news.headline: Ygrene Energy Fund makes Inc.'s 2024 Best in Business list for Financial Services, recognizing top companies.
news.summary: Ygrene Energy Fund has proudly secured a spot on Inc.'s prestigious 2024 Best in Business list, which acknowledges industry leaders excelling in their respective fields. This recognition specifically places Ygrene Energy Fund in the Financial Services category. The annual list highlights top-performing companies and showcases their dedication to excellence.

news.headline: Study by Sungkyunkwan University in Seoul uncovers genomic evolution of brown algae crucial for coastal habitats.
news.summary: In Seoul, South Korea, on December 19, 2024, it was reported that the Earth's oceans, which cover more than 70% of the planet's surface, are essential for maintaining ecological balance and supporting human health. Brown algae, known as Phaeophyceae, are highlighted for their crucial role in sustaining coastal habitats.

news.headline: Banzai acquires OpenReel, aims for $10 million+ revenue in 2024.
news.summary: Seattle-based company Banzai International, Inc. (NASDAQ: BNZI) revealed on December 19, 2024, that it completed the acquisition of OpenReel, a top digital video creation platform. Banzai specializes in marketing technology services and offers vital marketing and sales solutions. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone for Banzai as it expands its capabilities in the digital video sector.
